title: Simple Structures: Pale Garden
description: Adds small decorative details to the Pale Garden biome
body:
Adds small structures to the Pale Garden biome, making it diverse. At the moment,**20** structures have been added
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebab2d68fa0b5960203d1ad4a8aee752e2f87dbe.jpeg)

![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d40ee4600c4df407eea2cfe6c4e4898d5106dae.jpeg)
